ai-2.en: What do we not know yet?

ai-20.en: Where could we be more generous?

ai-21.en: What should be easy to admit?

ai-32.en: What would honesty look like here?

ai-35.en: What would a bad version of this change look like?

ai-36.en: What would a good version look like?

ai-37.en: What can we agree on today?
